category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the GitHub Model Context Protocol server for AI tools; official repository describes it as GitHub's official MCP Server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository identify the project as GitHub MCP Server.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GitHub MCP integration for AI tools; source_facts.executables shows the server executable.
